$schema.description: Relative path to this JSON Schema file. Keep this value so editors can provide validation, autocomplete, and inline documentation for deck.json.

order.description: Positive integer used to sort listed decks on the generated home page. Lower numbers appear first; decks with the same order fall back to sorting by directory slug.

route.description: Optional public URL slug for this deck. Omit this field to use the directory slug. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.

oneOf.description: Include this deck in the home page, full-site development proxy, and static site build.
Exclude this deck from the home page, full-site development proxy, and static site build, but still allow direct commands such as pnpm dev <slug> and pnpm export <slug>.
Treat this deck as unavailable. It is excluded from discovery and direct deck commands fail.

visibility.description: Controls whether the deck is published by the full-site workflows. Omit this field for the default listed behavior.
